description:
Return a list of all BIM File Extractions
A BIM File Extraction can fail for several reasons. When it does, the errors attribute contains a list of errors encountered while processing the model. The following table lists the possible error codes and types.

#### Error Types

| Code | Type                   |
|------|------------------------|
| 1    | Undefined              |
| 2    | NetworkErr             |
| 3    | ServerErr              |
| 4    | JsonParseErr           |
| 5    | TokenExp...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[extraction_format]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching extraction format

parameters.name: filters[bim_file_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified bim_file_id in bim_file_upload

parameters.name: filters[bim_file_upload_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified bim_file_upload_id

parameters.name: filters[file_version_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified file_version_id in bim_file_upload

parameters.name: filters[document_upload_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified document_upload_id in bim_file_upload

parameters.name: filters[document_revision_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified document_revision_id in bim_file_upload

parent_bim_file_extraction_id.description: ID of the parent BIM File Extraction

bim_file_upload_id.description: ID of the uploaded BIM File

bim_file_id.description: ID of the associated BIM File

document_upload_id.description: ID of the associated Document Upload

bim_model_revision_id.description: ID of the BIM Model Revision

progress.description: Progress of overall extraction taking into account the individual extraction items

retry_count.description: No. of retries performed on the extraction

extraction_format_requests.description: Array of items indicating formats of items requested to be extracted

extraction_items.description: An array of items extracted from a 3d model

errors.description: An array of errors encountered during extraction

items.description: An error that can occur during model processing.
